title: Aiouea maguireana
taxonomy: Aiouea maguireana is classified in the family Lauraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Aiouea, a group of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Lauraceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as laurel family. The family Lauraceae consists of approximately 2250-2500 species of plants. The classification of Aiouea maguireana reflects its evolutionary relationship with other plants within the Lauraceae family.
